blocks.text: The further you are from the domain, the less gen AI closes the gap
AI helps with conception, where outsiders can keep up; it falters on execution, where domain judgment is required
Experts (writers): own domain language and taste — AI accelerates first drafts they can refine
Adjacent outsiders (marketers): understand the goal, can edit AI output critically — biggest relative gain
Distant outsiders (technologists): lack context to judge what to keep or cut
